module_summary: Interwatch monitors documentation freshness — auto-discovers watchable docs by convention, detects drift via 14 signal types, scores confidence, and dispatches to generators for refresh.

now.title: Cross-project scanning: run discovery across all monorepo subprojects in one invocation.
Drift trend tracking: historical score progression over time.

next.title: Generator availability awareness: graceful degradation and install suggestions when interpath/interdoc missing.
Ambient mode (opt-in): periodic scan at Clavain session checkpoints.
Policy-driven escalation for critical or high-impact stale content.

done.title: Three-phase skill (detect/assess/refresh) with phase files and reference docs.
watchables.yaml with default entries for Vision, PRD, Roadmap, AGENTS.md, distillation-candidates.
Bead-count baseline tracking with snapshot-delta signals and --record-refresh reset.
Auto-discovery: convention-based watchable detection with signal_templates, discovery_rules, dedup, manual entry preservation.
Improved drift scoring with threshold refactoring (THRESHOLD_SIGNALS dispatch table).
